title: Demo AI Scientist for exoplanet atmosphere retrieval
objective: Find a knowledge gap and formulate a verifiable research hypothesis.

evidence.title: Self-supervised spectra representation
evidence.limitation: Limited validation on real JWST spectra

knowledge_gaps.description: Method 'Bayesian retrieval' has no recorded validation in scenario 'simulated spectra'.
knowledge_gaps.suggested_research_path: Run a targeted validation study with explicit baselines and failure-mode analysis.

knowledge_gaps.description: Method 'Self-supervised representation' has no recorded validation in scenario 'standard atmosphere'.
knowledge_gaps.suggested_research_path: Run a targeted validation study with explicit baselines and failure-mode analysis.

knowledge_gaps.description: Recorded limitation worth testing: Depends on assumed atmospheric model
knowledge_gaps.suggested_research_path: Formulate a hypothesis that directly attacks the documented limitation.

hypotheses.statement: Self-supervised spectral representations can reduce model-dependence in non-standard atmosphere retrieval.
hypotheses.mechanism: If spectral embeddings separate chemical feature families because they preserve wavelength-local absorption patterns, then retrieval should remain robust when atmospheric priors shift.
hypotheses.expected_value: Lower bias under non-standard atmospheric priors.
hypotheses.test_plan: Compare against Bayesian retrieval on synthetic and public spectra with shifted priors.
